name: Underpowered Night Spooks
short_description: Underpowered Night Spooks is a racing game that takes place in Japan in the early 1990s. Challenge a friend or an online player to a one-to-one race on tough courses where any distraction can cost your victory.
detailed_description:
Run like it's the 90s!

Underpowered Night Spooks is settled in Japan's countryside, the place where cars from the 1980s and 1990s became legendary. Pick a car and find an opponent for a one-versus-one battle.

Unique cars

Power, weight, and drivetrain type are not random numbers and acronyms that tell you which car is faster; they have real meaning and will affect the physics of the car. Each one has a unique feeling; find your own style.

Multiplayer battles

The game features a singleplayer time attack mode and is mainly focused on 1v1 PVP online matches. Call a friend or find your rival online and put your skills to the test!

Automatics vs Manual

Automatic cars are automatic, and manual cars are manual. There's no way to play with a manual car without shifting gears, or vice versa.

Get your keyboard ready!

The game is meant to be played with a keyboard without giving away the car's physics or its immersion.
